title: Onboarding flow optimization from product data to user success
use_when: Onboarding flow optimization from product data to user success. Use when the user needs a product workflow for business analysis related to onboarding flow optimization from product data to user success. Trigger terms: pm, onboarding, growth, user-success, business-analysis.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Onboarding flow optimization from product data to user success when the request is mainly generic marketing copy, product discovery, or finance valuation; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Onboarding growth diagnosis with activation experiments and success metrics
framework_fit: Appropriate when activation, onboarding completion, time-to-value, setup success, or early retention is the growth constraint.
failure_modes: Produces Onboarding growth diagnosis with activation experiments and success metrics without tying recommendations to the user's Growth stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Onboarding flow optimization from product data to user success as generic Growth advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Onboarding flow optimization from product data to user success when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $onboarding-flow-optimization-from-product-data-to-user-success to turn this onboarding context into a decision-ready Onboarding growth diagnosis with activation experiments and success metrics.
examples.expected_artifact: Onboarding growth diagnosis with activation experiments and success metrics
